creator: sv@ulstu.ru
text:
Created attachment 225279
Screenshot of errors

I use KDE Plasma. And I have orca and RHVoice installed. The RHVoice itself works fine. But if I choose RHVoice in the orca screenreader, then I do not hear any sound. When it is changed to espeak - it does makes sound. If I select RHVoice in the orca, then I see a lot of errors in the console. See attachment.

How do I make a RHVoice work in orca?

KDE Plasma 5.21.5, KDE Frameworks 5.82, Qt 5.15.2, FreeBSD 12.2-RELEASE-p6.
